mapper.insert: insert ignore into study_java_order_payment (request_id, order_id, payment_type, transaction_no, payment_status, amount, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) values (#{payment.requestId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payment.orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{payment.paymentType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{payment.transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payment.paymentStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{payment.amount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.select: select payment_id, request_id, order_id, payment_type, transaction_no, payment_status, amount, create_time, update_time, is_deleted from study_java_order_payment where request_id = #{requestId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and is_deleted = 0 for update
mapper.update: update study_java_order_payment set transaction_no = #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_status = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where request_id = #{requestId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and payment_status = 0 and is_deleted = 0
